steps.title: Link style to subject matter
steps.content: The Precisionists valued machine-like perfection, crisp lines, geometric shapes, and smooth surfaces. Skyscrapers, bridges, and factories naturally fit that visual style because they are angular, engineered structures.

steps.title: Reject contrast transitions
steps.content: Choice A and Choice B would signal contrast or concession, but the subject matter follows logically from the Precisionist style. Choice D suggests a final stage in a sequence, which the passage does not provide. A result transition is needed. The answer is C.
